prompt: When survival pressure dominates the synthesis read, choose fold.
why_v1: Fold protects tournament life when risk premium and stack pressure remove the margin to continue.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Folding fits the tournament cue set, so the line protects tournament life when the pressure and payout cost are against you.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Fold is better when survival pressure dominates, because risk premium and stack pressure remove the margin to continue with only a thin edge.
